curation_notes: Pre-assigned as sql-injection from CWE-89, but the patch fixes output encoding: it removes the Twig |raw filter (which disabled auto-escaping) from table name rendering, adds jQuery .text().html() encoding in the JS table list builder, and applies double HTML escaping for an innerHTML context. All three changes are standard XSS mitigations — reclassified to xss. Locations derived directly from the two files in the patch diff. No sibling templates in the designer directory use |raw on table or database names.
